tasks.title: Fix Documents Page Hardcoded Strings
tasks.description: The Documents page (/documents) has approximately 3 hardcoded English strings that need to be replaced with translation keys for proper internationalization support.
acceptanceCriteria: All hardcoded English strings in documents page are replaced with t() translation keys
Corresponding translations added to both en.json and zh.json
Page displays correctly in both English and Chinese
Build passes with no TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Fix Settings Page Translation Gaps
tasks.description: The Settings page (/settings) has 25+ hardcoded English strings that need internationalization. This includes form labels, button text, and descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All hardcoded English strings in settings page are replaced with t() translation keys
Corresponding translations added to both en.json and zh.json
All form controls, buttons, and descriptions display correctly in both languages
Settings form submission works correctly in both languages

tasks.title: Implement Memory File Write-Back API
tasks.description: The Memory page has an edit functionality (line 109-114) with a TODO comment for implementing file write-back API. Currently, edited memories are only logged to console.
acceptanceCriteria: Create API route at /api/memory/[id] for updating memory entries
Implement PUT endpoint to write changes back to OpenClaw memory files
Update handleSaveMemory function to call the new API
Add error handling for write failures
Test editing and saving a memory entry successfully updates the file
dependencies: Local OpenClaw environment required for testing

tasks.title: Add Real-Time Memory Search with OpenClaw Integration
tasks.description: The current useMemorySearch hook in the Memory page doesn't connect to the actual OpenClaw Gateway API. Implement real semantic search through OpenClaw's memory system.
acceptanceCriteria: Update useMemorySearch hook to call OpenClaw Gateway API at http://127.0.0.1:18789
Implement semantic search endpoint integration
Display actual memory entries from ~/.openclaw/memory/ directory
Handle API errors gracefully with fallback to mock data
Show relevant scores from OpenClaw's semantic search

tasks.title: Implement Real Agent Session Management
tasks.description: The Staff page currently shows mock agent data. Implement real connection to OpenClaw agent system to show actual agents, their sessions, and allow starting/stopping agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Connect to OpenClaw Gateway to retrieve real agent list
Show actual agent sessions from ~/.openclaw/agents/*/sessions/
Implement start/stop agent functionality
Display real-time agent status (running/stopped/error)
Show actual agent output and logs

tasks.title: Implement Gateway Connection Status Real-Time Updates
tasks.description: The Gateway page shows connection status but doesn't auto-update. Implement WebSocket or polling to show real-time status changes of the OpenClaw Gateway connection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add polling or WebSocket connection to Gateway health endpoint
Update status indicator in real-time when Gateway state changes
Show last check timestamp
Add manual refresh button
Handle connection failures gracefully

tasks.title: Add Dark Mode Persistence
tasks.description: The theme toggle currently doesn't persist user preference across sessions. Implement localStorage or cookie-based persistence for dark/light mode preference.
acceptanceCriteria: Save theme preference to localStorage or cookie
Load saved theme on page load
Apply theme before page renders to avoid flash
Sync theme across all pages
Test theme persistence after browser restart

tasks.title: Add Error Boundary Component
tasks.description: Implement error boundaries to gracefully handle component errors and show user-friendly error messages instead of crashing the entire page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ErrorBoundary component with fallback UI
Wrap main dashboard layout in ErrorBoundary
Log errors to console for debugging
Provide recovery options (refresh, go back)
Test error boundary with intentional errors

tasks.title: Implement Loading Skeleton States
tasks.description: Add skeleton loading states for all pages that fetch data from APIs. This improves perceived performance and user experience during data loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reusable Skeleton component variants
Add skeleton states to Overview page
Add skeleton states to Staff page
Add skeleton states to Tasks page
Ensure smooth transition from skeleton to content

tasks.title: Add Unit Tests for Critical Components
tasks.description: Set up testing framework and write unit tests for critical components like language-switcher, theme-provider, and key data hooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Install and configure Jest/React Testing Library
Write tests for language-switcher component
Write tests for theme-provider
Write tests for useMemorySearch hook
Achieve at least 70% code coverage on tested files
All tests pass: npm run test

tasks.title: Implement Task Approval Workflow UI
tasks.description: The Approvals page currently shows mock data. Implement real task approval workflow connecting to OpenClaw's approval system for human-in-the-loop task verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Connect to OpenClaw approval API
Display pending approvals with full task details
Implement approve/reject buttons with API calls
Show approval history and status
Add filters for approval type, agent, and date range

tasks.title: Add Document Preview Component
tasks.description: The Documents page lists files but doesn't show previews. Add a document preview modal or panel for quick file viewing without leaving the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DocumentPreview modal component
Support preview for text files, markdown, and images
Add syntax highlighting for code files
Show file metadata (size, modified date)
Add open in editor button

tasks.title: Optimize Bundle Size and Performance
tasks.description: Analyze and optimize the bundle size. Implement code splitting, lazy loading, and other performance optimizations to improve initial load time.
acceptanceCriteria: Run bundle analysis and identify large dependencies
Implement dynamic imports for heavy components
Add route-based code splitting
Optimize image loading with Next.js Image component
Measure and document performance improvements
Initial bundle size reduced by at least 20%

tasks.title: Add Accessibility Improvements
tasks.description: Improve accessibility across the dashboard by adding ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ARIA labels to all interactive elements
Ensure keyboard navigation works for all features
Add skip to main content link
Improve color contrast for text and buttons
Test with screen reader (VOiceOver/NVDA)
Pass Lighthouse accessibility audit with score > 90
